sql.query: UPDATE tbl_tasks SET status=:status,startedDate=CASE WHEN :status2='in_progress' THEN COALESCE(startedDate,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE startedDate END,completedDate=CASE WHEN :status3='complete' THEN COALESCE(completedDate,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE NULL END,completedByUserId=CASE WHEN :status4='complete' THEN :userId ELSE NULL END,modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=:id AND workflowId=:workflowId AND tenantId=:tenantId

UPDATE tbl_workflow_stages ws SET ws.status=(SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(t.id)=0 THEN 'not_started' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.isRequired=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN t.isRequired=1 AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=0 THEN 'complete' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'overdue' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('in_progress','complete') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'in_progress' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status='waiting' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'waiting' ELSE 'not_started' END FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.workflowStageId=ws.id AND t.tenantId=ws.tenantId),ws.modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ws.id=(SELECT x.workflowStageId FROM tbl_tasks x WHERE x.id=:taskId AND x.tenantId=:tenantId) AND ws.tenantId=:tenantId2
